Current duplicate pattern: Strategy brief, target-state, consolidation plan, import manifest and runbooks overlap in purpose and sequence.
Canonical target: Strategy folder v0.2 docs plus Strategy Review Queue
Source evidence: Strategy Review Queue SRQ-001 to SRQ-006; Quality Checks rows 49-55
Consolidation action: Compare each strategy document, select canonical statements, and mark superseded material only after review.
Keep / archive rule: Keep current v0.2 docs as canonical candidates; label older copies historical only after approval.
Review output needed: Accepted canonical strategy set, update owner, next review date and website placement.
Update target after accepted: Website Operating Hub Requirements; START HERE; Resource Library Index
Non-deletion boundary: No deletion, archive, sharing change, content approval, build approval or publication.
